scheme_name: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (AB-PMJAY)
ministry_department: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
short_description: World's largest health insurance scheme providing ₹5 Lakh annual coverage per family for secondary and tertiary hospitalization.
detailed_description: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (AB-PMJAY) is the world's largest health insurance/ assurance scheme fully financed by the government. It provides health cover of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization. The scheme covers over 10.74 crore poor and vulnerable families (approximately 50 crore beneficiaries) providing coverage for almost 40% of India's population. The scheme is cashless and paperless at empanelled hospitals.
key_benefits: Health cover of ₹5 Lakh per family per year
Cashless and paperless treatment at empanelled hospitals
No cap on family size or age
Covers pre-existing conditions from day one
Free treatment at government and empanelled private hospitals
financial_assistance: ₹5 Lakh health cover per family per year
other_conditions: Automatic inclusion for families meeting deprivation criteria
Covers entire family with no cap on family size
Pre-existing conditions covered from day one
Treatment must be at empanelled hospitals only
application_steps_online: Enter name and other details to check eligibility
If eligible, visit nearest empanelled hospital with Aadhaar
Hospital will generate Ayushman card and provide treatment
application_steps_offline: Check eligibility at nearest Common Service Centre (CSC)
If eligible, visit empanelled hospital with Aadhaar card
Hospital Ayushman Mitra will verify eligibility
Ayushman card will be generated at hospital
Receive cashless treatment as per scheme coverage

submission_locations.notes: Check hospital empanelment status on PMJAY website before visiting

faq.question: How do I know if I am eligible?
faq.answer: Visit pmjay.gov.in and check eligibility using your mobile number and name. Eligibility is based on SECC 2011 database.

faq.question: Do I need to pay any premium?
faq.answer: No, Ayushman Bharat is completely free. There is no enrollment fee, premium, or co-payment required.

faq.question: Can I use it anywhere in India?
faq.answer: Yes, the scheme is portable across India. You can avail treatment at any empanelled hospital in any state.

faq.question: Are pre-existing diseases covered?
faq.answer: Yes, all pre-existing conditions are covered from day one without any waiting period.

common_rejection_reasons: Procedure not covered under scheme package
tips_for_successful_application: Check eligibility online before visiting hospital
Always carry Aadhaar card for verification
Visit only empanelled hospitals (check on PMJAY website)
Contact Ayushman Mitra at hospital for assistance
Keep mobile number active for OTP verification
Generate Ayushman card at first hospital visit
